narrative:
Concord Township has 15,282 registered voters, with 52.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.2 percentage points.
